overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game showing a character with green hair, chest tattoos, and cybernetic implants walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character traverses covered walkways, passes a hotel entrance and vending machines, walks along streets with colorful LED barriers, and ascends stairs to an elevated walkway while holding a drink.

events.description: passes food stall with green awning and neon 'OPEN' sign

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered walkway holding a drink, passing benches and planters

large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered pedestrian walkway with a semi-transparent roof overhead. The path features wooden benches and concrete planters on the sides. Passing a food stall with a green canvas awning and neon 'OPEN' sign, the character continues past piles of cardboard boxes and closed metal shutters on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel entrance plaza with vending machines

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza area with Hotel & Spa entrance
passes bright green vending machines illuminating the yellow wall

agents.ego_description: walking past the Hotel & Spa entrance and continuing along the sidewalk near vending machines

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gray outfit walking in same direction near vending machines

entered.detail: large glass entrance doors with metal frames and illuminated interior
illuminated signage reading 'HOTEL & SPA' with star symbols above entrance
bright green illuminated vending machines with product displays
dark-colored vending machines with yellow warning symbols
bright yellow structural wall behind vending machines

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a plaza area featuring the glass entrance of a Hotel & Spa with illuminated signage. Several pedestrians are gathered near the entrance. The character continues past a bank of bright green vending machines mounted against a vivid yellow wall, transitioning from the enclosed walkway to a more open commercial area.

events.description: LED barrier walls shift colors from yellow to pink to green
character approaches and begins ascending stairway to elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the street-level promenade parallel to traffic, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic cars driving along the adjacent street behind LED barriers

entered.detail: tall translucent barrier wall with color-changing LED lights cycling through yellow, pink, and green
massive curved overpass or elevated highway structure with supporting columns
tall building covered in large digital advertisements and neon signage
covered waiting area with bench and digital display

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open street-level promenade bordered by color-changing LED barrier walls that shift from yellow to pink to green. Futuristic vehicles drive on the adjacent road behind the barriers, while massive elevated highway structures and buildings covered in digital billboards dominate the background. The character passes a bus stop shelter and other pedestrians before approaching a stairway.

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs to upper level walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs following other pedestrians up to the elevated walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red vest and blue pants ascending stairs ahead of ego

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with white painted edge lines leading upward
bright yellow painted walls lining the stairwell enclosure
silver metal handrail along the right side of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the street level to a stairwell with bright yellow walls and concrete steps, ascending toward an elevated walkway. Following other pedestrians up the stairs, the neon-lit street and LED barriers fall away behind as the character climbs higher into the enclosed stairwell structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered pedestrian corridor into a vibrant, open-air cyberpunk plaza and finally upward into an elevated structure. It begins within a covered walkway featuring a semi-transparent roof, passing wooden benches and a food stall with a neon open sign. As the character emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens into a commercial plaza characterized by the glass entrance of a Hotel & Spa and a bank of bright green vending machines against a vivid yellow wall. The camera then follows the character onto an open promenade bordered by color-changing LED barriers and towering digital billboards before approaching a street-level stairway. Finally, the perspective shifts upward as the character ascends a yellow-walled stairwell, leaving the neon-lit street and traffic behind to reach an elevated walkway.
